chapter_goal: Summarizes Euclidean isometries as translations, rotations, reflections, and orthogonal affine maps.

title: Isometries of Euclidean spaces

visual_sequence.observation: Inspect how isometry turns the unit's definitions into visible, checkable geometry.
Inspect how rotation turns the unit's definitions into visible, checkable geometry.
Inspect how reflection turns the unit's definitions into visible, checkable geometry.
Inspect how composition turns the unit's definitions into visible, checkable geometry.
